message.content:
This screen displays a personal portfolio/developer profile page.  

### Visible Text:  
- Top left: "Bruno Pau" (with a profile icon)  
- Top right: "Menu", "Download CV", "PT" (Portuguese), "EN" (English)  
- Main heading: "HELLO, MY NAME IS BRUNO" (green text)  
- Subheading: "And I build websites." (green text)  
- Role: "Full Stack MERN Developer |"  
- Tech stack: "MongoDB - Express - React - Node.js |"  
- Description: "Creating efficient, scalable web applications focused on user experience."  
- Section title: "Projects"  


### Colors:  
- Background: Dark gradient (green to purple)  
- Text: Green (headings), white (body text)  
- UI elements: Dark gray/black for buttons/links  


### Layout:  
- **Top bar**: Profile icon + name on left; menu, CV download, language toggles on right.  
- **Main content**: Centered vertical layout with:  
  - Large green headings (intro/name).  
  - White body text (role, tech, description) in a single column.  
  - "Projects" section title (white) with a placeholder card below (dark gradient, no visible content).  


### Elements:  
- Profile icon (circular, top left).  
- "Menu" button (top right).  
- "Download CV" button (top right).  
- Language toggle ("PT"/"EN", top right).  
- Heading text blocks.  
- Descriptive paragraph.  
- "Projects" section with a placeholder card (likely for project previews).  


### Difference from Previous Screens:  
Assuming prior screens had different content (e.g., no "Projects" section, different text/structure), this screen introduces a **"Projects" section** and focuses on a personal intro (name, role, tech stack) rather than other content. The layout and color scheme remain consistent (dark gradient, green/white text), but the content shifts to a portfolio-focused intro.
